positive: A vibrant, minimalist composition featuring a stylized mountain range silhouette at sunset, overlaid with abstract geometric elements like arcs and intersecting lines. The mountains should be deep sapphire blue, contrasting sharply against a gradient sky of warm orange, peach, and lavender. Use clean, flat vector art aesthetics with high contrast and bold negative space. The composition must be perfectly centered and suitable for textile printing, ensuring all lines are crisp and scalable. Style: Modern, Boho, Abstract Minimalism. Lighting: Flat, vivid color block style. Composition: Centered focal point, high contrast silhouette.
negative: blur, grainy, artifacts, text, signature, watermark, low quality, noise, bad anatomy, extra limbs, photorealistic, complex details, gradient lines (except for sky gradient), writing, logo
